value.found_quote:
## Inter-Agent Communication

Agents communicate by sending messages to each other using unique agent IDs.
value.rationale: The page, hosted on Google's Antigravity documentation, has a dedicated "Inter-Agent Communication" section describing how agents send messages to each other using unique agent IDs, with flexible routing, auto-wake, and shared transcripts. This directly substantiates the claim. It is presented as a current capability with no indication of preview or retirement.
